parameters.sqlQuery:
SELECT
ARRAY_AGG(DISTINCT cliente IGNORE NULLS) as clientes,
ARRAY_AGG(DISTINCT praca IGNORE NULLS) as pracas,
ARRAY_AGG(DISTINCT veiculo IGNORE NULLS) as veiculos,
ARRAY_AGG(DISTINCT meio IGNORE NULLS) as meios
FROM `checking-grupoom.form_checking.checking_logs`
WHERE dt_inicio_veic IS NOT NULL
  AND dt_inicio_veic >= '{{ $json.body.data_inicio }}'
  AND dt_fim_veic <= '{{ $json.body.data_fim }}'

parameters.sqlQuery:
SELECT
  COUNTIF(status = 'pending')  AS total_pending,
  COUNTIF(status = 'approved') AS total_approved,
  COUNTIF(status = 'rejected') AS total_rejected,
  COUNT(*)                      AS total_geral,
  COUNTIF(status = 'pending' AND is_complement = 0) AS novos_pendentes,
  COUNTIF(status = 'pending' AND is_complement = 1) AS complementos_pendentes
FROM (
  SELECT *
  FROM `checking-grupoom.form_checking.checking_logs`
  WHERE NOT STARTS_WITH(submission_id, 'rej_')
    AND ingestion_time BETWEEN
        TIMESTAMP('{{ $json.body.date_from || "2026-01-01" }}')
        AND TIMESTAMP('{{ $json.body.date_to || "2026-12-31" }}')
  QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
    PARTITION BY n_pi
    ORDER BY CASE WHEN status = 'approved' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, submission_id DESC
  ) = 1
)

googleBigQueryOAuth2Api.name: Painel Cliente - Painel de Aprovação - Formulario

parameters.sqlQuery:
SELECT
  submission_id, n_pi, cliente, veiculo, nome_contato, email_contato, meio,
  total_arquivos, is_complement, webViewLink, status, rejection_count,
  rejection_reason, approval_user,
  NULLIF(approved_at, TIMESTAMP('1970-01-01')) AS approved_at,
  NULLIF(rejected_at, TIMESTAMP('1970-01-01')) AS rejected_at,
  ingestion_time AS created_at
FROM `checking-grupoom.form_checking.checking_logs`
WHERE NOT STARTS_WITH(submission_id, 'rej_')
  AND (status IS NULL OR status = 'pending' OR status = '')
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
  PARTITION BY n_pi
  ORDER BY submission_id DESC
) = 1
ORDER BY CAST(SPLIT(submission_id, '_')[OFFSET(0)] AS INT64) DESC

parameters.sqlQuery:
SELECT
  submission_id, n_pi, cliente, veiculo, nome_contato, email_contato, meio,
  total_arquivos, is_complement, webViewLink, status, rejection_count,
  rejection_reason, approval_user,
  NULLIF(approved_at, TIMESTAMP('1970-01-01')) AS approved_at,
  NULLIF(rejected_at, TIMESTAMP('1970-01-01')) AS rejected_at,
  ingestion_time as created_at
FROM `checking-grupoom.form_checking.checking_logs`
WHERE NOT STARTS_WITH(submission_id, 'rej_')
  AND NOT STARTS_WITH(submission_id, 'err_')
  AND (status IS NULL OR status != 'ERROR')
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
  PARTITION BY n_pi
  ORDER BY
    CASE WHEN status = 'approved' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END,
    submission_id DESC
) = 1
ORDER BY ingestion_time DESC

googleBigQueryOAuth2Api.name: Painel Cliente - Painel de Aprovação - Formulario

parameters.sqlQuery:
SELECT
  submission_id, n_pi, cliente, veiculo, nome_contato, email_contato, meio,
  total_arquivos, is_complement, webViewLink, status, rejection_count,
  rejection_reason, approval_user,
  NULLIF(approved_at, TIMESTAMP('1970-01-01')) AS approved_at,
  NULLIF(rejected_at, TIMESTAMP('1970-01-01')) AS rejected_at
FROM `checking-grupoom.form_checking.checking_logs`
WHERE
  NOT STARTS_WITH(submission_id, 'rej_')
  AND (CAST('{{ $json.body.status || \"\" }}' AS STRING) = '' OR status = '{{ $json.body.status || \"\" }}')
  AND (CAST('{{ $json.body.cliente || \"\" }}' AS STRING) = '' OR UPPER(cliente) LIKE UPPER('%{{ $json.body.cliente || \"\" }}%'))
  AND (CAST('{{ $json.body.n_pi || \"\" }}' AS STRING) = '' OR n_pi = '{{ $json.body.n_pi || \"\" }}')
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
  PARTITION BY n_pi
  ORDER BY
    CASE WHEN status = 'approved' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END,
    submission_id DESC
) = 1
ORDER BY submission_id DESC

parameters.sqlQuery:
SELECT 'sla' AS alert_type, submission_id, n_pi, cliente, veiculo, nome_contato, meio,
  TIMESTAMP_DIFF(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(), ingestion_time, HOUR) AS sla_hours,
  CAST(NULL AS INT64) AS rejection_count
FROM `checking-grupoom.form_checking.checking_logs`
WHERE status = 'pending'
  AND TIMESTAMP_DIFF(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(), ingestion_time, HOUR) > 48
  AND ('{{ $json._auth.role }}' = 'admin' OR assigned_to = '{{ $json._auth.email }}')
UNION ALL
SELECT 'reincidencia' AS alert_type, submission_id, n_pi, cliente, veiculo, nome_contato, meio,
  CAST(NULL AS INT64) AS sla_hours, rejection_count
FROM `checking-grupoom.form_checking.checking_logs`
WHERE COALESCE(rejection_count,0) > 2
  AND ('{{ $json._auth.role }}' = 'admin' OR assigned_to = '{{ $json._auth.email }}')
ORDER BY sla_hours DESC
LIMIT 200

googleBigQueryOAuth2Api.name: Painel Cliente - Painel de Aprovação - Formulario

parameters.sqlQuery:
SELECT
  nome_contato, email_contato, telefone,
  COUNT(*) AS total_envios,
  COUNTIF(status = 'approved') AS aprovados,
  COUNTIF(status = 'rejected') AS rejeitados,
  ROUND(COUNTIF(status = 'approved') / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) * 100, 1) AS taxa_aprovacao,
  AVG(CASE WHEN status = 'approved' THEN TIMESTAMP_DIFF(approved_at, ingestion_time, HOUR) END) AS sla_medio,
  MAX(ingestion_time) AS ultimo_envio
FROM `checking-grupoom.form_checking.checking_logs`
WHERE NOT STARTS_WITH(submission_id, 'rej_')
GROUP BY nome_contato, email_contato, telefone
ORDER BY total_envios DESC
LIMIT 100

googleBigQueryOAuth2Api.name: Painel Cliente - Painel de Aprovação - Formulario

parameters.sqlQuery:
SELECT assigned_to,
  COUNTIF(status = 'approved') AS baixados,
  COUNTIF(status = 'pending') AS pendentes,
  COUNTIF(status = 'rejected') AS rejeitados,
  AVG(CASE WHEN status = 'approved' THEN TIMESTAMP_DIFF(approved_at, ingestion_time, HOUR) END) AS sla_medio
FROM `checking-grupoom.form_checking.checking_logs`
WHERE NOT STARTS_WITH(submission_id, 'rej_')
  AND ingestion_time BETWEEN TIMESTAMP('{{ $json.body.date_from || "2026-01-01" }}') AND TIMESTAMP('{{ $json.body.date_to || "2026-12-31" }}')
GROUP BY assigned_to
ORDER BY pendentes DESC

googleBigQueryOAuth2Api.name: Painel Cliente - Painel de Aprovação - Formulario

parameters.sqlQuery:
SELECT submission_id, n_pi, cliente, veiculo, meio, status, ingestion_time
FROM `checking-grupoom.form_checking.checking_logs`
WHERE NOT STARTS_WITH(submission_id, 'rej_')
  AND assigned_to = '{{ $json._auth.email }}'
  AND ingestion_time BETWEEN TIMESTAMP('{{ $json.body.date_from || "2026-01-01" }}') AND TIMESTAMP('{{ $json.body.date_to || "2026-12-31" }}')
ORDER BY ingestion_time ASC

googleBigQueryOAuth2Api.name: Painel Cliente - Painel de Aprovação - Formulario

parameters.sqlQuery:
SELECT
  c.submission_id, c.n_pi, c.cliente, c.veiculo, c.meio, c.nome_contato,
  c.total_arquivos, c.is_complement, c.status, c.rejection_count, c.rejection_reason, c.observacoes,
  s.total_envios, s.aprovados, s.rejeitados, s.taxa_aprovacao, s.sla_medio
FROM `checking-grupoom.form_checking.checking_logs` c
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT nome_contato,
    COUNT(*) AS total_envios,
    COUNTIF(status='approved') AS aprovados,
    COUNTIF(status='rejected') AS rejeitados,
    ROUND(COUNTIF(status='approved')/NULLIF(COUNT(*),0)*100,1) AS taxa_aprovacao,
    AVG(CASE WHEN status='approved' THEN TIMESTAMP_DIFF(approved_at, ingestion_time, HOUR) END) AS sla_medio
  FROM `checking-grupoom.form_checking.checking_logs`
  GROUP BY nome_contato
) s ON s.nome_contato = c.nome_contato
WHERE c.submission_id = '{{ $json.body.submission_id }}'
LIMIT 1

parameters.sqlQuery:
MERGE `checking-grupoom.form_checking.pi_responsaveis` T
USING (SELECT '{{ $json.body.n_pi }}' AS n_pi, '{{ $json.body.mes_referencia }}' AS mes_referencia) S
ON T.n_pi = S.n_pi AND T.mes_referencia = S.mes_referencia
WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET
  responsavel = '{{ $json.body.responsavel }}',
  responsavel_nome = '{{ $json.body.responsavel_nome || "" }}',
  conta = '{{ $json.body.conta || "" }}',
  atribuido_por = '{{ $json.authenticatedUser?.email || "sistema" }}',
  atribuido_em = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP()
WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT
  (n_pi, responsavel, responsavel_nome, mes_referencia, conta, atribuido_por, atribuido_em)
VALUES
  ('{{ $json.body.n_pi }}', '{{ $json.body.responsavel }}', '{{ $json.body.responsavel_nome || "" }}', '{{ $json.body.mes_referencia }}', '{{ $json.body.conta || "" }}', '{{ $json.authenticatedUser?.email || "sistema" }}', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP())

googleBigQueryOAuth2Api.name: Painel Cliente - Painel de Aprovação - Formulario

parameters.sqlQuery:
SELECT n_pi, responsavel, responsavel_nome, conta, mes_referencia,
  FORMAT_TIMESTAMP('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', atribuido_em) AS atribuido_em
FROM `checking-grupoom.form_checking.pi_responsaveis`
WHERE ('{{ $json.body.mes_referencia || "" }}' = '' OR mes_referencia = '{{ $json.body.mes_referencia }}')
ORDER BY conta, n_pi

googleBigQueryOAuth2Api.name: Painel Cliente - Painel de Aprovação - Formulario

parameters.sqlQuery:
INSERT INTO `checking-grupoom.form_checking.checking_comments`
(id, submission_id, n_pi, comentario, tipo, autor, autor_nome, created_at)
VALUES (
  GENERATE_UUID(),
  '{{ $json.body.submission_id }}',
  '{{ $json.body.n_pi || "" }}',
  '{{ $json.body.comentario || "" }}',
  '{{ $json.body.tipo || "nota" }}',
  '{{ $json.authenticatedUser?.email || $json.body.autor || "sistema" }}',
  '{{ $json.authenticatedUser?.name || "" }}',
  CURRENT_TIMESTAMP()
)

googleBigQueryOAuth2Api.name: Painel Cliente - Painel de Aprovação - Formulario

parameters.sqlQuery:
SELECT id, comentario, tipo, autor, autor_nome,
  FORMAT_TIMESTAMP('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', created_at) AS created_at
FROM `checking-grupoom.form_checking.checking_comments`
WHERE submission_id = '{{ $json.body.submission_id }}'
ORDER BY created_at DESC

googleBigQueryOAuth2Api.name: Painel Cliente - Painel de Aprovação - Formulario

parameters.sqlQuery:
MERGE `checking-grupoom.form_checking.suppliers` T
USING (SELECT '{{ $json.body.veiculo }}' AS veiculo) S
ON T.veiculo = S.veiculo
WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET rating = {{ Number($json.body.rating) || 0 }}, updated_by = '{{ $json.authenticatedUser?.email || "" }}', updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP()
WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (veiculo, rating, updated_by, updated_at) VALUES ('{{ $json.body.veiculo }}', {{ Number($json.body.rating) || 0 }}, '{{ $json.authenticatedUser?.email || "" }}', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP())

googleBigQueryOAuth2Api.name: Painel Cliente - Painel de Aprovação - Formulario

parameters.sqlQuery: SELECT veiculo, rating, observacao FROM `checking-grupoom.form_checking.suppliers` ORDER BY rating DESC, veiculo

googleBigQueryOAuth2Api.name: Painel Cliente - Painel de Aprovação - Formulario

parameters.sqlQuery:
UPDATE `checking-grupoom.form_checking.checking_logs`
SET status = '{{ $json.body.status }}',
    approval_user = '{{ $json.body.approval_user || $json.authenticatedUser?.email || "" }}',
    approved_at = CASE WHEN '{{ $json.body.status }}' = 'approved' THEN CURRENT_TIMESTAMP() ELSE approved_at END,
    rejected_at = CASE WHEN '{{ $json.body.status }}' = 'rejected' THEN CURRENT_TIMESTAMP() ELSE rejected_at END
WHERE submission_id = '{{ $json.body.id }}'

googleBigQueryOAuth2Api.name: Painel Cliente - Painel de Aprovação - Formulario

parameters.sqlQuery:
MERGE `checking-grupoom.form_checking.sla_config` T
USING (SELECT 'global' AS id) S ON T.id = S.id
WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET horas_atencao = {{ Number($json.body.horas_atencao) || 5 }}, horas_risco = {{ Number($json.body.horas_risco) || 12 }}, updated_by = '{{ $json.authenticatedUser?.email || "" }}', updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP()
WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (id, horas_atencao, horas_risco) VALUES ('global', {{ Number($json.body.horas_atencao) || 5 }}, {{ Number($json.body.horas_risco) || 12 }})

googleBigQueryOAuth2Api.name: Painel Cliente - Painel de Aprovação - Formulario

parameters.sqlQuery: SELECT horas_atencao, horas_risco FROM `checking-grupoom.form_checking.sla_config` WHERE id = 'global' LIMIT 1

googleBigQueryOAuth2Api.name: Painel Cliente - Painel de Aprovação - Formulario
